name: git-skills
description: Curated, general-purpose Agent Skills you can install by name.

plugins.name: study
plugins.description: A personal tutor that helps you learn a subject deeply across many sessions, building a persistent workspace (goal, sources, interactive lessons, progress records, cheat sheets) so learning compounds instead of restarting each time.

plugins.name: cross-examine
plugins.description: Interrogates you one question at a time to pressure-test a plan or design, surfacing blind spots and hidden assumptions, then compiles a consolidated plan.

plugins.name: red-team
plugins.description: Builds the strongest case against a position – a fair steelman of the target, the most damaging objections ranked by severity, and the best defense it can still mount. Works on your own thinking or someone else's.

plugins.name: scope-it
plugins.description: Turns a vague request into a concrete spec in one pass – goal, scope, non-goals, and acceptance criteria – with assumptions made explicit and the blocking unknowns pulled to the top as open questions.

plugins.name: session-brief
plugins.description: Distills the current session into a copy-pasteable continuation prompt so a fresh session can resume the work without re-explaining it.
